title: Finalize execution plan document cleanup
outOfScope: Deleting Work Item Contracts, Summaries, Cockpit Status, review evidence, release evidence, or design specifications.
Changing implementation, tests, release metadata, or published release assets.
Deleting historical plans or any plan with unresolved inbound references.

sources.reason: Authoritative execution-plan index and retention policy.
User-authorized serial remediation plan whose final Work Item is this cleanup.
Earlier plan already marked historical and used to verify supersession.
Archived Contracts, Summaries, PR and release evidence used for classification.

rawUserRequest: 继续按已授权的串行整改计划执行，完成最后的执行计划文档清理工单；每个工单都必须完成 PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、分支清理和主分支同步，直到全部任务完成。

riskAssessment.reason: Only status/index documentation is being updated; authoritative evidence is retained.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized serial execution through final execution-plan cleanup after release publication.

preReviewWarnings: Verify every indexed plan classification and retain all referenced audit artifacts.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The execution-plan index classifies every plan as current, completed-retained, superseded, or historical, with no broken links.
The 2026-07-21 plan records Work Items 1–17 as complete, including PR #168, release workflow 29825891328, published v0.5.34, closure, and branch cleanup evidence.
The 2026-07-20 plan remains historical and is explicitly superseded by the 2026-07-21 plan; no Contract, Summary, Status, review evidence, release evidence, or design document is deleted.
Documentation, governance, status-consistency, and full quality checks pass after cleanup.
guidelines: Preserve audit evidence and do not delete authoritative Work Item records.
Use evidence-backed status language and preserve the enterprise security NO-GO boundary.

intent.problem: The repository contains several dated remediation plans, and the latest plan still describes its final cleanup as future work. Readers need one indexed, evidence-backed status view without losing historical audit records.
constraints: Keep all Contracts, Summaries, generated status, review evidence, release evidence, and referenced design specifications.
Do not claim enterprise security, universal semantic intent detection, or unpublished release facts.
Perform this as the final Work Item and do not create another remediation item after closure.
intent.rationale: A small index/status update closes the documentation loop while preserving the immutable Work Item and release trail.

declaredIntent.summary: Classify and close the repository's execution-plan documentation after the authorized remediation loop and v0.5.34 publication.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Every plan file is reachable from the index and classified without deleting audit evidence.
The latest plan records actual release and Work Item closure evidence rather than future intent.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized serial execution through the final execution-plan cleanup item, including PR, merge, closure, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
